task_completion.description: Create a new 'Audio Recording' item in the Jurism library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jurism interface should show a new item selected in the middle pane, and the right-hand Info pane should display 'Item Type' set to 'Audio Recording'.
The 'Title' field in the Jurism Info pane should contain exactly 'The Alibi'.
The 'Performer' field in the Jurism Info pane should contain 'Koenig' for the last name and 'Sarah' for the first name.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Series Title and Date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Series Title' field should contain 'Serial' and the 'Date' field should contain '2014-10-03'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Format and Running Time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Format' field should contain 'Podcast' and the 'Running Time' field should contain '53:00'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Label and URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Label' field should contain 'WBEZ Chicago' and the 'URL' field should contain 'https://serialpodcast.org/season-one/1/the-alibi'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jurism graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jurism application window being actively used (e.g., clicking buttons, typing in fields) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to modify the Jurism SQLite database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing sqlite3 commands or Python scripts modifying the zotero.sqlite/jurism.sqlite file.

integrity.description: The agent typed or pasted the information into the correct fields in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text should appear inside the standard Jurism metadata fields in the right-hand pane, not in a separate text editor or mock UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must input the exact metadata requested: Title: 'The Alibi', Performer: 'Sarah Koenig' (First: Sarah, Last: Koenig), Series Title: 'Serial', Date: '2014-10-03', Format: 'Podcast', Running Time: '53:00', Label: 'WBEZ Chicago', URL: 'https://serialpodcast.org/season-one/1/the-alibi'. Note that while the actual podcast running time might be 53:36 or 54:00 depending on the platform, the agent MUST enter '53:00' as explicitly requested in the task description.
